title: taraxacum illyricum
intro: Taraxacum illyricum, also known as the Balkan dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat digestive issues, inflammation, and other health problems. The plant's roots and leaves are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Taraxacum illyricum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, skin conditions, and other ailments.
